repositories.last_commit_msg: feat: implement GPT quotation tracking and enhance deployment configuration
repositories.role: Business vertical — BMC panel calculator and quotation tool
repositories.description: Professional quotation calculator for BMC Uruguay thermal/acoustic insulation panels. React 18 + Vite frontend with Express backend for MercadoLibre OAuth. Generates BOM, PDF, WhatsApp text. Contains pricing engine, calculation engines for roof/wall panels, and 4 construction scenarios.

repositories.last_commit_msg: chore: bootstrap isolated GPT configuration repository
repositories.role: Isolated GPT configuration and autopilot system
repositories.description: Separated GPT configuration repo containing: gpt/actions/ (OpenAPI schemas), gpt/config/ (routing, schemas, status machine, manual gates), gpt/instructions/ (system prompts, session qualification, maintenance), gpt/examples/ (API payload samples), autopilot/ (quote automation engine with audit logging), docs/ (setup, workflow, integrations with MercadoLibre and Google Sheets).

repositories.role: Core GPT Panelin — integration, strategy, and evolution hub
repositories.description: Main GPT Panelin repository with massive knowledge base. Contains: BMC knowledge JSON files (v2, v4, v6), pricing masters (bromyros), GPT instructions for PDF/pricing, quotation calculator (Python), training guides, Shopify catalog indexes, validation scripts, package scripts for GPT upload, and an EVOLUCIONADOR daily workflow. Has nested version directories (V3.2, V3.2-1, V3.2-new, V3.3) suggesting iterative development with accumulated worktrees. 30 open PRs indicate heavy automated activity.

repositories.last_commit_msg: Update subproject commit to indicate a dirty state and modify .DS_Store binary file.
repositories.role: Knowledge governance — GPT configuration, training, and truth base management
repositories.description: Massive knowledge governance repository. Contains: consolidated BMC knowledge bases (v5.0, v6.0 JSON), GPT configuration analysis, MongoDB config, Shopify catalog exports, Gemini/Google Labs integration (GEMS), agent guides (ingestion, analysis, integration), KB training system, GPT simulation agent, project file organizer agent. Root-level files are flat (no folder organization for many .md files). Largest repo by file count (25K+), likely including binary/generated content.

repositories.last_commit_msg: Merge remote to resolve conflicts in task.md, tsconfig.json, and package-lock.json removal
repositories.role: Monorepo consolidation target — apps, packages, agents, CI/CD
repositories.description: Monorepo attempt with apps/, packages/, scripts/ structure. Contains chatbot improvements analysis, architect prompts, Vercel deploy guides. Has the most workflows (8) and largest file count (123K, likely including node_modules or generated content). Multiple nested copies of itself (2026_Mono_rep, -1, -2) suggest merge conflicts and worktree experiments. Has Neon (Postgres) workflow integration.

repositories.role: Chatbot orchestrator — n8n workflows, Chatwoot, Rasa, Qdrant vector DB
repositories.description: Full-stack chatbot platform with: n8n workflow orchestrator (WF_MAIN, WF_KB_ingest, WF_ERRORS, WF_TOGGLE), Chatwoot (customer messaging), Rasa (NLU), Qdrant (vector search), PostgreSQL, Docker Compose infrastructure. Contains agent system with autonomous agents workflow, QA agent, and PR suggestion agent. Python-based with Makefile. Team member projects subfolder suggests multi-contributor setup.

repositories.last_commit_msg: Add Claude Code documentation including web usage, hooks, settings, security, and data policies
repositories.role: Local-only GPT panel prototype with Claude Code docs
repositories.description: Minimal local-only repo with gpt_panel.py and docs/ folder. No GitHub remote. Branch name suggests Claude Code integration experiment. 289 files mostly in docs/ (likely Claude Code documentation dump). Low strategic value unless gpt_panel.py contains unique logic.

repositories.role: Business vertical — intelligent quotation system with AI, WhatsApp, Google Sheets
repositories.description: Intelligent quotation system for BMC with AI, WhatsApp integration, Google Sheets. Next.js frontend, Python scripts, n8n workflows (duplicated in two folders). Multiple deployment guides and summaries suggest iterative deployment attempts. Last commit November 2025 — 4 months stale. Likely superseded by Calculadora-BMC-GPT autopilot functionality.

repositories.role: Legacy chatbot — evolved version of earlier chatbot with heavy automation
repositories.description: Extensive chatbot system with: AI agents architecture, n8n workflows, k8s configs, backup system, consolidation tools, middleware, models, services layer. 10 GitHub workflows including auto-approve, cloud-agent-daily, repo-research-cloud, validate-knowledge. 125+ merged PRs, 30 open. Default branch is 'new-branch' (not main). Appears to be an evolution of the ChatBOT repo with more enterprise features but may have been superseded. Duplicated n8n-workflows/n8n_workflows pattern seen in bmc-cotizacion-inteligente.

repositories.role: Google AI Studio (Gemini) version of Panelin calculator
repositories.description: Minimal React/TypeScript calculator using Google Gemini AI (services/geminiService.ts). Contains merge strategy and implementation roadmap for integrating GPT Panelin features. Only 17 files total. Single PR merged (#1: plan merge GPT Panelin features). Appears to be an experimental port of the Panelin calculator to use Google AI instead of OpenAI.
